since_last: 35% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.34%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.61% · BTC -0.92% · Gold +0.40% · Nasdaq100 -1.30%. 35% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.34%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.34%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.38%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -10.67%
cards.body: Leaders: ZS +4.51%, PANW +3.75%, SKHY +3.57%, OKTA +3.29%, LEU +3.28%. Laggards: ISRG -10.67%, UPST -4.89%, META -4.81%, AMAT -4.63%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.58% at $126.42
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.58% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
